infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow camera access so you can take a photo for distance measurement.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow photo library access so you can choose an image for distance measurement.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access so you can detect the flag and measure distance live.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow access to your photos so you can choose an image for distance measurement.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow camera access so you can take a photo for distance measurement.
